description: Baseline cross-substance eval prompts — Section 1 of tests/eval-guide.md. Each prompt is run through every substance skill; outputs should be maximally differentiated.

prompts.text: I've been thinking about my father a lot lately.
prompts.tests: Emotional processing style, relational quality, somatic grounding
Perceptual dimension, synesthetic response, cognitive style
Set/setting handling, shadow inclusion, therapeutic container
Insight quality, cognitive style, substance character
Onset behavior (HARD FAIL if any substance delivers peak wisdom), therapeutic orientation, guru detection
